experience.title: Co-Founder & Full-Stack Developer
details: Supported and enhanced a production web system using Django and REST Framework, contributing to application workflows and system reliability within a cloud-based environment.
Assisted in maintaining an automated data collection process (Selenium, Requests), supporting scheduled execution, retries, deduplication, and structured CSV outputs for operational reporting.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern
details: Developed a full-stack submission feature by integrating a Next.js (React + TypeScript) client with a FastAPI API.
Built core submission endpoints with Pydantic validation, iteratively debugging and refining OPENAI API prompt that reduced response waiting time by 20%.

experience.title: Peer-Assisted Learning (PAL) Leader – C Programming
details: Provided technical support through collaborative debugging sessions, investigating issues and explaining root causes to users with varying technical backgrounds.
Helped a student raise quiz from 20% to 90% and assignment grade from 40% to 99.5% within 6 weeks.

experience.title: Executive Leader
details: Reduced manual setup time by 75% by building a Python automation script on Raspberry Pi to configure and automate keypad input.
Attracted 300 people through 6 workshops delivering sessions on Flask, Python, and Selenium.

projects.title: AI-Powered AuditRAG — Traceable Answering System
details: Built a source-grounded RAG system with normalized chunking, JSONL indexing, stable chunk anchors, and dense embedding retrieval cutting unsupported answers by 20%.
Implemented an AI research assistant to automate ingestion and retrieval over financial filings and market news, enabling semantic top-k search across embedded chunks.

projects.title: Stock Daily Report Automation (UIPath)
details: Developed a UIPath automation to retrieve and process daily market data for a small configurable list of stock tickers and generate a standardized Excel report.
Automated report distribution via Outlook email, reducing manual reporting steps by 30% and improving consistency of daily delivery.

skills.title: Operating Systems & Systems Analysis
skills: systems analysis fundamentals including requirements gathering
